steps.t: Dithalion is by the forges in Rivendell. Hundi bid you to show your new weapon to Dithalion, an Elf of Rivendell who will be able to help you make use…
Dithalion is at the Forges of Rivendell.
Dithalion is at the Forges of Rivendell. You have inscribed a tracery into your weapon and should now speak with Dithalion.
